changeSet.author: eqms
changeSet.sql:
DO $$ DECLARE org_id bigint; admin_id bigint; qa_user_id bigint; author_user_id bigint; operator_user_id bigint; full_capa_id bigint; current_year int := EXTRACT(YEAR FROM now() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::int; BEGIN SELECT id INTO org_id FROM organizations WHERE code = 'DEFAULT'; SELECT id INTO admin_id FROM users WHERE email = 'admin@eqms.local'; SELECT id INTO qa_user_id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo.qa@eqms.local'; SELECT id INTO author_user_id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo.author@eqms.local'; SELECT id INTO operator_user_id FROM users WHERE email = 'demo.operator@eqms.local'; IF org_id IS NULL THEN RETURN; END IF; admin_id := COALESCE(admin_id, qa_user_id, author_user_id, operator_user_id); qa_user_id := COALESCE(qa_user_id, admin_id); author_user_id := COALESCE(author_user_id, admin_id); operator_user_id := COALESCE(operator_user_id, qa_user_id, admin_id); INSERT INTO capas ( capa_number, title, description, source, root_cause, status, effectiveness_check_required, effectiveness_check_result, due_date, closed_date, submitted_by, event_date, priority, about_type, about_reference, about_details, party_type, party_first_name, party_last_name, party_job_title, party_company, party_email, party_phone, containment_details, document_references, keywords, corrective_action_plan, preventive_action_plan, assigned_to, assignment_status, assignment_comment, organization_id, version, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by ) VALUES ( 'CAPA-' || current_year || '-004', 'Full demo CAPA: packaging reconciliation and line clearance controls', $html$

During QA review of batch BATCH-2026-002, packaging reconciliation records showed a 24-unit variance and delayed second-person line clearance confirmation.

  • Affected product: Paracetamol 500 mg Tablets.
  • Potential impact: label mix-up or undocumented reject destruction.
  • Immediate QA decision: hold finished packs pending reconciliation and documented investigation.
$html$, 'DEVIATION', $html$

Analysis Method: 5 Whys

Root Cause Statement: The approved line clearance checklist did not force barcode verification before label roll staging, and operators relied on manual visual checks for similar label rolls.

Evidence Reviewed: Batch record packet, reject log, line clearance checklist, QA interview notes, and warehouse staging photos.

Related NCs: NC-2026-002

$html$, 'IN_PROGRESS', true, 'Effectiveness check planned after three consecutive packaging runs with zero reconciliation discrepancies.', now() + interval '28 days', null, qa_user_id, now() - interval '6 days', 'MAJOR', 'PRODUCT', 'Paracetamol 500 mg Tablets / BATCH-' || current_year || '-002', $html$

Item / record: Paracetamol 500 mg Tablets

Category / format: Finished product packaging batch

Supplier / owner: Manufacturing and Packaging Operations

Identifier: BATCH-2026-002

Additional notes: Demo record intentionally includes all CAPA fields for screen, filter, and report review.

$html$, 'INTERNAL', 'Demo', 'Operator', 'Packaging Line Operator', 'Nairobi GMP Site', 'demo.operator@eqms.local', '+254700100300', $html$

Immediate containment completed:

  1. Finished packs from the affected packaging order were placed under QA hold.
  2. Line clearance checklist, reject log, and label reconciliation sheets were collected.
  3. Warehouse staging area was photographed and label rolls were segregated by SKU and batch.
  4. QA performed a 100% recount before disposition.
$html$, $html$
  • SOP-2026-001 Batch Manufacturing Record Review SOP v2.0
  • FORM-2026-001 Line Clearance Checklist
  • WI-2026-001 HPLC Assay Sample Preparation
  • External: packaging-line-photos.zip
  • External: signed-reconciliation-review.pdf
$html$, 'packaging, reconciliation, line clearance, label control, barcode verification, operator training, full demo', $html$

Implementation Target Date: 26-Jun-2026 14:52

Effectiveness Target Date: 14-Jul-2026 14:52

Responsibility: QA and Packaging Operations

Action Required: Revise the line clearance checklist to include barcode verification, require second-person confirmation before label staging, and update the batch record reconciliation review step.

Action Taken: Draft checklist update prepared and reviewed with QA. Barcode scanner verification step configured in the packaging room checklist.

Completed By: Demo QA Manager

Completion Date: Pending final approval

Effectiveness: QA will review three consecutive batches for zero undocumented reconciliation variance and complete a targeted operator knowledge check.

Reviewed By: Demo QA Manager

Review Date: Planned

$html$, $html$

Implementation Target Date: 30-Jun-2026 09:00

Effectiveness Target Date: 21-Jul-2026 09:00

Responsibility: Manufacturing Training Coordinator

Action Required: Train packaging operators on revised line clearance controls, label roll segregation, and escalation requirements when reconciliation variance is observed.

Action Taken: Training assignment prepared for all packaging operators and supervisors.

Completed By: Pending

Completion Date: Pending

Effectiveness: Training completion and supervisor floor observation will be checked before CAPA closure.

Reviewed By: Pending

Review Date: Planned

$html$, qa_user_id, 'ASSIGNED', $html$

Assigned to QA for coordination with Manufacturing, Warehouse, and Document Control.

Next review: confirm checklist approval, training completion, and first post-change packaging run evidence.

$html$, org_id, 4, now() - interval '6 days', author_user_id, now() - interval '1 hour', qa_user_id ) ON CONFLICT (capa_number) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, description = EXCLUDED.description, source = EXCLUDED.source, root_cause = EXCLUDED.root_cause, status = EXCLUDED.status, effectiveness_check_required = EXCLUDED.effectiveness_check_required, effectiveness_check_result = EXCLUDED.effectiveness_check_result, due_date = EXCLUDED.due_date, closed_date = EXCLUDED.closed_date, submitted_by = EXCLUDED.submitted_by, event_date = EXCLUDED.event_date, priority = EXCLUDED.priority, about_type = EXCLUDED.about_type, about_reference = EXCLUDED.about_reference, about_details = EXCLUDED.about_details, party_type = EXCLUDED.party_type, party_first_name = EXCLUDED.party_first_name, party_last_name = EXCLUDED.party_last_name, party_job_title = EXCLUDED.party_job_title, party_company = EXCLUDED.party_company, party_email = EXCLUDED.party_email, party_phone = EXCLUDED.party_phone, containment_details = EXCLUDED.containment_details, document_references = EXCLUDED.document_references, keywords = EXCLUDED.keywords, corrective_action_plan = EXCLUDED.corrective_action_plan, preventive_action_plan = EXCLUDED.preventive_action_plan, assigned_to = EXCLUDED.assigned_to, assignment_status = EXCLUDED.assignment_status, assignment_comment = EXCLUDED.assignment_comment, organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by RETURNING id INTO full_capa_id; INSERT INTO capa_actions (capa_id, action_type, description, assigned_to, due_date, completed_date, organization_id, version, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by) SELECT full_capa_id, 'CORRECTIVE', 'Approve revised line clearance checklist with barcode verification and second-person label roll confirmation.', qa_user_id, now() + interval '7 days', null, org_id, 0, now() - interval '5 days', qa_user_id, now() - interval '1 hour', qa_user_id WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM capa_actions WHERE capa_id = full_capa_id AND description = 'Approve revised line clearance checklist with barcode verification and second-person label roll confirmation.'); INSERT INTO capa_actions (capa_id, action_type, description, assigned_to, due_date, completed_date, organization_id, version, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by) SELECT full_capa_id, 'CORRECTIVE', 'Perform documented reconciliation review on the first packaging run after checklist update.', author_user_id, now() + interval '14 days', null, org_id, 0, now() - interval '5 days', qa_user_id, now() - interval '1 hour', qa_user_id WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM capa_actions WHERE capa_id = full_capa_id AND description = 'Perform documented reconciliation review on the first packaging run after checklist update.'); INSERT INTO capa_actions (capa_id, action_type, description, assigned_to, due_date, completed_date, organization_id, version, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by) SELECT full_capa_id, 'PREVENTIVE', 'Complete targeted retraining for packaging operators and supervisors on label roll staging and variance escalation.', operator_user_id, now() + interval '21 days', null, org_id, 0, now() - interval '5 days', qa_user_id, now() - interval '1 hour', qa_user_id WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM capa_actions WHERE capa_id = full_capa_id AND description = 'Complete targeted retraining for packaging operators and supervisors on label roll staging and variance escalation.'); INSERT INTO audit_logs (record_type, record_id, action, field_name, old_value, new_value, reason_for_change, user_id, user_full_name, utc_timestamp, ip_address, user_agent, organization_id) SELECT 'Capa', full_capa_id::text, 'CREATE', null, null, 'CAPA-' || current_year || '-004', 'Full-detail CAPA demo seeded', author_user_id, 'Demo Document Author', now() - interval '6 days', '127.0.0.1', 'Liquibase demo seed', org_id WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM audit_logs WHERE record_type = 'Capa' AND record_id = full_capa_id::text AND reason_for_change = 'Full-detail CAPA demo seeded'); INSERT INTO audit_logs (record_type, record_id, action, field_name, old_value, new_value, reason_for_change, user_id, user_full_name, utc_timestamp, ip_address, user_agent, organization_id) SELECT 'Capa', full_capa_id::text, 'UPDATE', 'details', null, 'Root cause, containment, action plans, documents, keywords, and assignment populated', 'Expanded CAPA demo details', qa_user_id, 'Demo QA Manager', now() - interval '1 hour', '127.0.0.1', 'Liquibase demo seed', org_id WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM audit_logs WHERE record_type = 'Capa' AND record_id = full_capa_id::text AND reason_for_change = 'Expanded CAPA demo details'); INSERT INTO record_sequences (module_code, year, prefix, current_value, padding, format, created_at, updated_at, version, organization_id) VALUES ('CAPA', current_year, 'CAPA', 20, 3, '{prefix}-{year}-{seq}', now(), now(), 0, org_id) ON CONFLICT (module_code, year) DO UPDATE SET current_value = GREATEST(record_sequences.current_value, 20), updated_at = now(); END $$;
